name: git-worktree-helper
description: Create and safely clean up Git worktrees while synchronizing local agent configuration.

interface.shortDescription: Create and clean up Git worktrees safely.
interface.longDescription: Create isolated Git worktrees, synchronize local project and agent configuration, and remove completed worktrees with safety checks.
defaultPrompt: Create a worktree for this task.
Create a worktree from this base branch.
Safely clean up this completed worktree.
